titleStmt.title: SII 18.113: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 113. (B.K. No. 5 of 1932-33.) AGAḌI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone near the temple of Basavaṇṇa in S. No. 240.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 40, Manmatha, Pushya Amāvāsyā, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, solar eclipse The date is irregular. In the cyclic year Manmatha, the tithī cited corresponds to A.D. 1116, January 16, which was a Sunday. There was no eclipse on that day and the Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti fell on Saturday, 25th December, A.D. 1115.

It gives a eulogistic account of [Mahā]pasāyta Baṁkeyarasa who was governing from his headquarters, Agaṇḍe, the divisions of Beḷguhe Seventy, Iṭṭage Thirty, some kampaṇas in Banavāse Twelve-thousand and some agrahāras. It states that his subordinate Birudaradēva built a temple of Birudēśvara at Agaṇḍe and granted some lands for the worship and offerings to the god. The gift-land was purchased from Eṟaka-gāvuṇḍa and was entrusted to Varēs11vara-Paṇḍita. Another grant of paddy and oil to the same god is recorded. The record is very badly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē
vṛtaṁ vīralakṣmī
vikramāditya samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvī vallabha
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara
daṇḍanāyaka
ppasamastaśāstra rjjitaṁ jita mūrti viśvalōkastutakīrtti sanda gamaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ .
hṛta maṇḍanamaṇibhavana bāhudaṇḍa jaya śrī
vadana maṇimukuṭa lōkasaṁhā
siyakamaṁgalaṁ negaḻda praḻaya tereyūru kōya tūrppiri
cōḷamahī rājadhānigaḷ tarataradiṁ
kānanā śrī
taḷedaṁ mahi diyu . svasti sama mahāśabda
hēśvaraṁ rāmaṁ triṇītraṁ
vipulaṁ dharmasaṁga kali vikramā mṛgamallaṁ
vairihritsellaṁ birudaradēvaṁ naṁṭarabhāvaṁ tappetappuvaṁ śauryyanara
saṁkasūrekāṟaṁ parabaḷasūrekāṟaṁ tribhuvanamalladēva
vairigharaṭṭaṁ nijaviśuddhakīrttilalanā śrī kāmi nēkavākyaṁ
nīticāṇakyanāśritajaṁgamasurataru samasta gaṇikā
manōjaṁ kaṁdukavatsarājaṁ lakṣmī śrīmatu
gaṇḍara gummādyanēkanāmāvaḷīsaṁ śrīmanmahā maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvana pasā
ytabaṁkeyarasar beḷguheyerppattu viṭṭigemūvata yāge banavāse pa
nnircchāsiradoḷagaṇa palavuṁ śirada kaṁpaṇaṁ grāma mahāgrahā yumanera
ḍarunūṟaṟoḷage savaṇūru savasi kuṁdugōḷa vuṁ mahāgrahāraṁgaḷmaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷana
dināḷuttavagaṁḍeya bīḍinoḷ sukhadinarasugeyyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi sikṣākāra chātraṁ ba ra dharmmaputra
da birudaradēvanēdoreyanaṁdaḍe tajanadeḍa dēvakāryyadeḍegaṁ tavi ḍe nōḍane kūḍi ja
samaṁ paḍedaṁ palarppogaḷe negaḻda birudara noḍadāḷu doḷumenisi darege namuṁ naya
gātu biru kyāvanipara nāḷage yoḷu tāramaṁdramadhyadhvaniyiṁ kēḷisidanu bha
ya gāya jayyaṁdu pogaḷe biru kaṁ . dōrapaseṭiyarbbesageyda manumārggānvitarappa
dharmmaṇanuvā cāvuṇḍanuṁ dēsiyuṁ rssatiyar tanagiṣṭadaivavadhināthaṁ
ka bhūpāḷakaṁ . gurugaḷ gavarēśvarāryyarpparadaṁ tāṁ mānyaṁ birudaradēvane dalāge
sumatiyoḷ . triṇayanabhaktiyoḷā mānavanuttu yenipane saddharmadakaṇi
sujanāgraṇiyenipaṁ birudaradēvaṁ . tridaśā sāsirmmaḍi viśēṣamanagaṁḍeyoḷo
ppire mudadimmāḍisidanosedu birudaradēvaṁ . birudaradēvana mā puruṣārttha mūrttigoṇḍu nelasidudeṁbaṁtire birudēśvaranesedaṁ
daṁ birudaradēvaṁge tiyiṁ birudēśvaradēvara pūjegaṁ nēvēdyakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkeṁdagaṇḍeyeṟakagāvuṁḍana
kayyoḷ birudēśvaradēguladiṁ baḍagaṇa samīpa caviya gaḍiṁbadalirmma ttaru keyyumaṁ [Ā]dēguladiṁ pattire teṁkaṇamaryyā
de keṟeyiṁda mūḍal teṁkaṇa kavilegallu ḍakeya tōṁṭamuṁ ma pattire mūḍalagaṁḍeya kōṭeya paḍuvaṇapaḷḷaṁ
baraṁ nimiṟda paraḍōḷige manā voladiṁ paḍuvaṇa hūdōṭamumaṁ keṁgeṟeya modalēriya keḷagirppattaydu kamma
garddeyumaṁ dravyapūrvvakaṁ haḍadu birudaradēvaṁ māṟugoṇḍu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 40 neya manma
thasaṁvatsarada pauṣyadamāvāsye sōmavāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti sūryya grahaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu . vādigharaṭṭaṁ du
rddharavādimahāpraḷayakālabhairavarūpaṁ vāri ya pavanaṁ mēdiniyoḷ vādidēvamunipaṁ negaḻdaṁ . Ā vādidēvana
śiṣyar . paramaśivāgamagaganāntarasūryyaṁ parama tārṇnavacaṁdraṁ paramēśvaracaraṇāṁbujavarabhṛṁgaṁ śrīvarēśvarabrati
nāthaṁ . Antenisida varēśvarapaṁḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārapūrvvakaṁ sarvva namasyamāge biṭṭaṁ . Ī dharmmamanagaṁḍeya prabhu kajjaṁta
reṟakagāvuṁḍanu vātana tammaṁ suṁkiṁgeṟeya bammagāvuṁḍanuvādiyāge kajjaṁtavaṁśa diruvagaṁḍeyaṟuvattokkaluvalliyeṁṭu
hiṭṭuṁ beḷkuheyarppataṟa prabhugāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ nāḍamanneyaruṁ mēlāḷkeyara suṁ pratipāḷisuvar . Agaṁḍeya bammiseṭṭi mu
khyavāgi nagaravaynūrvvaruvagaṁḍeyalu soṁṭigeya bhattamumaṁ biṭṭaru telligarayva ttokkalu dēvara
naṁdādīvigege gāṇadalu soṁṭigeyeṇneyaṁ biṭṭarintī dharmmamanāvanōrvvaṁ pratipāḷisidavaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrameṁba puṇyatīrttha
gaḷoḷ sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsira kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṁgaḷiṁdaṁ kaṭṭisi sā sirvvarvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarige dakṣiṇegoṭṭa phalamakku
Aḻipidanidanekkōṭiya naḻipaṁ tīrtthaṁgaḷanitumanitumanōṟaṁtaḷidaṁ paśuvaṁ pārvvaranaḷidaṁ meyyaḷidanātanajaguji
giḻidaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētu
rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētān bhāginaḥ pārtthi vēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
śrī birudēśvaradēvara kaluvesake Ayicōjanoḍeya
Digital edition of SII 18.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
